identity.mission: Create a high-performance, electric, and distinct Speed Networking experience. No AI slop. Function over trend, but make it visceral.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Stock Market Ticker' urgency with 'VIP Event' exclusivity.
Emotion First: Speed = Adrenaline. Design must feel fast.
Content is King: The 'Match' is the hero. The 'Leaderboard' is the stage.
Contrast: Deep blacks vs. Neon accents. No muddy greys.

layout_rules: Use 'col-span-full' for section headers on mobile.
Admin Dashboard: Use 'The Swiss Grid' - asymmetrical blocks.
Live Screen: 100% width fluid containers, auto-scroll focus.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/25 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200 font-medium tracking-wide px-8 py-3

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 text-white placeholder:text-white/20 h-12

navigation.mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-white/10 z-50 h-16 safe-area-pb
navigation.desktop: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Use a subtle fixed noise overlay at 2% opacity for analog feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: PHASE 1: Setup Theme. Implement the dark mode colors in 'tailwind.config.js' immediately. Extend the theme with the specific neon accents.
PHASE 2: Layouts. Build the 'Admin Dashboard' using the 'Bento Grid' strategy. Do not use standard bootstrap rows.
PHASE 3: User App. Focus on 'Thumb Zone' navigation. Primary actions (Punch, Scan) must be bottom-aligned.
PHASE 4: Live Screen. This is a TV interface. Use 'vh' units for typography to ensure readability at distance. High contrast is mandatory.
CRITICAL: Do not use gradients for text. It impairs readability on projectors.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes.
universal_guidelines: Avoid AI slop: No generic centered layouts.
Dark colors: Use independently, avoid dark gradients.
Depth: Use z-index and layered shadows.
Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md or xl with semi-transparent backgrounds.
Transitions: Specific properties only (transform, opacity, colors), never 'all'.
No text-align: center on app container.
Buttons: Sharp or pill-shaped, animated on hover.
Micro-animations: Hover, active, focus states are mandatory.
